title: MacroExpansionResult
description: Final payload submitted by the MacroExpanderAgent (Stage 4). Carries the normalized TeX source after user-defined macro expansion plus a per-macro substitution audit.

reason.description: Optional escape hatch: set to `no_macros_in_paper` when the TeX source genuinely defines no user macros so the semantic-success check (FP-RPT3a A4) does not mark the stage degraded.

normalized_tex.description: The full TeX source with all user-defined macros expanded inline.

expansions_applied.description: One entry per expanded macro definition.

name.description: Macro control-sequence name including the leading backslash, e.g. `\R`.

body.description: Macro body as defined (with `#1`/`#2`/... placeholders for parameters).

occurrences.description: Number of textual occurrences substituted during normalization.
